name: iShares Silver Trust
summary: The iShares Silver Trust (SLV) is a grantor trust formed under New York law whose purpose is to own physical silver transferred in exchange for shares. Each share represents a fractional undivided beneficial interest in the Trust's net assets, primarily silver held by JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., London Branch. The Trust is sponsored by iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC, a BlackRock subsidiary, and listed on NYSE Arca under ticker SLV.

products.name: iShares Silver Trust Shares (SLV)
products.description: Exchange-traded shares backed by physical silver held in custody, listed on NYSE Arca, providing investors silver price exposure without direct metal ownership.

partnerships.partner_name: JPMorgan Chase Bank N.A., London Branch
partnerships.description: Serves as custodian, safekeeping the Trust's physical silver at vaults in England and New York.

partnerships.partner_name: The Bank of New York Mellon
partnerships.description: Serves as trustee of the Trust, responsible for NAV calculation and oversight of custodial arrangements.
Parent company of the Sponsor, iShares Delaware Trust Sponsor LLC, which sponsors and manages the Trust.
Acts as authorized representative of the Trustee to inspect premises where the Trust's silver is warehoused.
Co-inspector alongside Bureau Veritas Commodities UK Ltd.; issued inspection report on May 12, 2025.
